message:
Merge PR #2186: fix(refinery): remove hardcoded severity/priority logic

Remove hardcoded severity and priority assignment from refinery engineer,
letting the anomaly detection pipeline handle classification dynamically.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2186
